description: Add a notification center with persistent read state, unread indicators, filtering, and read cleanup.

userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state stored durably so read and unread status survives across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Stored notifications include a read-state field that persists across user sessions.
Existing notifications default to unread unless a read state is already recorded.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add shared notification read-state types and queries
userStories.description: As a developer, I want shared notification read-state definitions and retrieval helpers so unread calculations stay consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared notification read-state type supports unread and read values.
Notification queries can return unread counts and notification lists with read-state values.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Persist read and unread state updates
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read-state changes saved so notifications stay in the state I chose.
acceptanceCriteria: Application can update an individual notification between unread and read.
Updated read state is returned correctly in subsequent notification queries.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show unread badge for notification center
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge for notifications so I can notice pending updates quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Visible notification badge shows unread count when unread notifications exist.
Badge count matches unread notification query results after page refresh.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Open notification center list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to open a notification list so I can review recent notifications in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center opens a visible list of notifications with each item read state shown.
Opening the list renders persisted notifications in a consistent order.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add read and unread controls in notification list
userStories.description: As a user, I want controls to mark individual notifications read or unread so I can manage what still needs attention.
acceptanceCriteria: Each notification item offers controls to mark it read or unread based on its current state.
Using a control updates the rendered item state and unread badge count after save.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter notifications by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so I can focus on unread or previously handled items.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center offers All, Unread, and Read filter options.
Selecting a filter updates the visible list to notifications that match the chosen state.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear notifications already marked read so my notification list stays focused on active items.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center exposes a clear action for notifications currently marked read.
Running clear removes read notifications from the visible list while leaving unread notifications intact.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
